beginner.name: LM Studio
beginner.why: Polished GUI, ships MLX on Apple Silicon, one-click model downloads.

power.name: mlx-lm
power.why: Apple's MLX framework, usually the fastest on Apple Silicon for the same quant.

runtimes.name: MLX / mlx-lm
runtimes.what: Apple-native inference, usually fastest on M-series

runtimes.name: Rapid-MLX
runtimes.what: MLX inference server with an OpenAI-compatible API, prompt cache and tool calling; brew or pip install

gotcha: vLLM is NOT a Mac tool, it is a CUDA/Linux serving engine. Unified memory is not a fixed VRAM slice; ~70% is usable for weights.
ceiling: M-series with 16GB runs up to ~8B comfortably; 64GB+ runs 70B at Q4.

beginner.name: LM Studio
beginner.why: Best GUI on Windows, auto-detects CUDA/Vulkan backends.

power.name: Ollama (CUDA)
power.why: Scriptable server; CUDA path is fastest on NVIDIA.

gotcha: AMD GPUs run via Vulkan/ROCm at roughly half CUDA throughput. NVIDIA is the smooth path on Windows.
ceiling: 12GB VRAM runs up to ~14B at Q4; 24GB runs 32B at Q4.

beginner.name: Ollama
beginner.command: curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh && ollama run llama3.1:8b

power.name: vLLM
power.why: Highest throughput for serving many requests; PagedAttention + continuous batching.
power.command: pip install vllm && vllm serve meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct

gotcha: vLLM shines for multi-user serving/throughput. For a single local chat, Ollama or llama.cpp is simpler and lighter.
ceiling: Scales with VRAM; multi-GPU for 70B+ at higher precision.

beginner.name: Apple Foundation Models
beginner.why: Built into iOS 26, ~3B on-device model, zero download, fully private.

power.name: PocketPal AI
power.why: Run any GGUF from HuggingFace fully offline.

gotcha: Phones realistically run 1B-4B class models. Anything larger thermally throttles or OOMs.
ceiling: 1B-4B at Q4 on 8GB iPhones; iPad Pro M4 (16GB) handles more.

beginner.name: PocketPal AI
beginner.why: Polished app, download GGUF and run offline.

power.name: MLC LLM / LiteRT-LM
power.why: GPU/NPU acceleration paths for supported chips.

gotcha: NPU acceleration is limited and chip-specific; most apps run on CPU. Expect 1B-4B class.
